**`r format(nrow(mk), big.mark = ",")` markers across `r length(unique(mk$cluster))` clusters** from the `r assay_name` assay.

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=20}
scMultiData_wm <- scMultiData
DefaultAssay(scMultiData_wm) <- assay_name
Idents(scMultiData_wm) <- wnn_cluster_col
p <- Seurat::DotPlot(scMultiData_wm, features = top_genes, assay = assay_name) +
  ggplot2::coord_flip() +
  ggplot2::scale_color_viridis_c(option = "D") +
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11),
                 axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11),
                 axis.title  = ggplot2::element_text(size = 12),
                 legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))
print(p)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
ezRun::ezInteractiveTableRmd(mk, title = paste(label, "cluster markers"))
```
